mapper.select: SELECT r.record_id AS recordId, r.patient_id AS patientId, p.patient_name AS patientName, r.chief_complaint AS chiefComplaint, r.present_history AS presentHistory, r.past_history AS pastHistory, r.physical_exam AS physicalExam, r.initial_diagnosis AS initialDiagnosis, r.operate_doctor_id AS operateDoctorId, r.operate_doctor AS operateDoctor, r.image_id AS imageId, r.image_path AS imagePath, r.ai_result_path AS aiResultPath, r.create_time AS createTime, r.update_time AS updateTime, r.remark AS remark FROM medical_record r LEFT JOIN medical_patient p ON p.patient_id = r.patient_id WHERE r.image_id = #{imageId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_record SET chief_complaint = #{chiefComplaint}, present_history = #{presentHistory}, past_history = #{pastHistory}, physical_exam = #{physicalExam}, initial_diagnosis = #{initialDiagnosis}, operate_doctor_id = #{operateDoctorId}, operate_doctor = #{operateDoctor}, image_path = #{imagePath}, ai_result_path = #{aiResultPath}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
